title: The Rescue Force Regroups
description: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Franky, Kaku, Luffy, Zoro, Nami. The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SASASASSA!! So? Did I look like you?

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: And yet, your face didn't even twitch!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: S... scary... my heart almost jumped out...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: You fell for his trick, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Damn you! Stop making that face!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Okay, leave this guy to me.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You two, go to the next car!!

summary: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
